title: ehrharta geniculata
intro: Ehrharta geniculata, also known as bent grass, is a type of grass found in Australia, known for its medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Ehrharta geniculata include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, promote wound healing, and act as an antiseptic agent. Ehrharta geniculata can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used topically as a poultice or salve, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
